alt: Sea otter mother carrying a small pup
caption: A sea otter pup stays very close to its mother while she keeps it warm and safe.
acquisitionNotes: Manually curated otter baby image with verified sea otter identification. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/c/c1/Sea_Otter_mother_with_one_baby_pup_%289168550173%29.jpg
